title: AmethystToolTexture
description:
AmethystToolTexture resource-pack Needs AmethystToolCrafting,
AmethystToolCrafting makes all tools craftable with amethyst-shard.
body:
## AmethystToolTexture

This resource pack adds custom textures for all the Amethyst-Shard tools and items introduced by the AmethystToolCrafting datapack! With this pack, your newly crafted Amethyst-Shard tools will have a distinct, polished Amethyst-Shard appearance, making them feel like a true addition to your world.

---

### Hard Dependency

This resource pack is designed to work exclusively with the **AmethystToolCrafting** datapack. It provides textures for the custom items added by that pack and will not function as intended without it.

[**Get the AmethystToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Amethysttoolcrafting)

---

### New Textures Included:

* **Tools:** 
    * Copper Axe
    * Copper Hoe
    * Copper Pickaxe
    * Copper Shovel
    * Copper Sword
    * Diamond Axe
    * Diamond Hoe
    * Diamond Pickaxe
    * Diamond Shovel
    * Diamond Sword
    * Iron Axe
    * Iron Hoe
    * Iron Pickaxe
    * Iron Shovel
    * Iron Sword
    * Golden Axe
    * Golden Hoe
    * Golden Pickaxe
    * Golden Shovel
    * Golden Sword
    * Stone Axe
    * Stone Hoe
    * Stone Pickaxe
    * Stone Shovel
    * Stone Sword
    * Wooden Axe
    * Wooden Hoe
    * Wooden Pickaxe
    * Wooden Shovel
    * Wooden Sword
    * Bow
    * Fishing Rod
    * Carrot on a Stick
    * Warped Fungus on a Stick
    * Brush

---
